audit_items.proof_trace: The handler rejects out-of-range requests with RpcErrorResponse::InvalidRequest (error code 1) at L1402-1408, but the Ethereum consensus spec mandates RESOURCE_UNAVAILABLE (error code 3) for requests outside the data_column_serve_range. InvalidRequest is reserved for malformed requests, not unavailable data.
audit_items.attack_scenario: A peer requesting data columns outside the serve range receives InvalidRequest instead of ResourceUnavailable, violating spec compliance and potentially causing interoperability issues where spec-compliant peers may ban or deprioritize this node for incorrect error responses.
